# Virtue-Theoretic Reliabilism

**Node Type:** synthesis
**Node ID:** ec63703f-0778-4f06-81bd-45bf40870462
**Depth:** 5
**Terminal:** No

**Parent:** [Can knowledge based on misleading evidence be intellectually virtuous?](can-knowledge-based-on-misleading-evidence-be-intellectually-virtuous-antithesis-ca9499ed-6039-41db-a223-7894e4e22fcc.md)

## Content

**A person knows a proposition if they believe the proposition**, **A person knows a proposition if the proposition is true**, **A person knows a proposition if their belief is generated by a reliable faculty**, **A reliable faculty is one that produces a high ratio of true beliefs over false beliefs**
